module.name: cli
module.purpose: Contains the marix-client-cli command-line binary entrypoint. The CLI accepts exactly --interactive or --oneshot "request", drains signature-aware ClientEvent output, prints Common messages and optional Done messages through print_event to keep same-signature output contiguous, and exits oneshot on Done completion for the active signature. It also parses config.telemetry.server_address and connects the telemetry Logger before starting the ClientSession.
